calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Allow Late Filing Of Application For And Renewal Of Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-05-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF TAMALPAIS INVESTMENT CORPORATION'S Motion To Allow Late Filing Of Application For And Renewal Of Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
